stem: Which expression represents the result of increasing a positive quantity q by 28%?
rationale: Choice A is correct. Increasing a positive quantity q by 28% gives the original quantity plus 28% of the quantity: q + 0.28q = 1.28q. Choice B is incorrect because 0.72q represents decreasing q by 28% (since 100% - 28% = 72%). Choice C is incorrect because 28q represents multiplying q by 28, not increasing it by 28%. Choice D is incorrect because 0.28q is only 28% of q, not the result of increasing q by 28%.
